title: The Ritual Chamber
summary: The party pushes deeper, confronting Serevath the cult priest mid-ritual in the Ritual Chamber. The shard sings with necrotic energy. If the ritual completes, Malgrath partially reconstitutes — setting up the boss encounter in the final Boss Chamber.

scenes.title: The Crypt Passage
scenes.body: Ancient stone sarcophagi line the walls of the Crypt. Most have been broken open and are empty. A DC 12 Investigation check finds faint scratch marks on the inside of one lid — someone tried to claw their way out. At the far end a heavy door bears the seal of Malgrath (the ring from Scene 1-2 opens it without a check; otherwise DC 18 Thieves' Tools).

scenes.title: The Ritual Chamber
scenes.body: A floating violet shard orbits a black stone altar at the room's centre. Serevath, a gaunt human priest in full ceremonial regalia, stands within a chalk circle chanting. Four cultist acolytes maintain the outer ward. The shard pulses faster as the ritual nears completion — the party has approximately 3 rounds before the partial reconstitution occurs.

scenes.title: The Boss Chamber
scenes.body: Beyond a shattered archway, Malgrath's amber-eyed phylactery-stone rests on a dais of black iron. If the party stopped the ritual in Scene 2-2, the chamber is empty save for two Wight guardians. If the ritual completed, Malgrath stands here — diminished but aware, furious, and ready to fight for his freedom.
